body.title: Calving split operation — reparent subtree root to new tree
body.result: 5089a74f — calve_subtree(node_id) sets parent_id=NULL, tree_size CTE, _find_tree_root, _deepest_child. Ring trace logged. 12 tests.
body.description: cortex.calve_subtree(node_id) — set parent_id=NULL on the subtree root, making it a new tree root. Node IDs don't change, so all references still resolve. Return the new root ID and count of nodes in the new tree.
